lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਏ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥੪॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: har jap jap naanak bhe nihaal |4|11|
lines.english: Chanting and meditating on the Lord, Nanak is exalted and enraptured. ||4||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਮਰਥ ਸਦਾ ਦਇਆਲ ॥
lines.translit: gur samarath sadaa deaal |
lines.english: The Guru is All-powerful and Merciful forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੇ ਕੀਨਾ ਰਿਦੈ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gurasabade keenaa ridai nivaas |3|
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad has come to dwell within my heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਤ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur gur karat sadaa sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Chanting Guru, Guru, I have found eternal peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਭਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: santasangat mil bheaa pragaas |
lines.english: Joining the Society of the Saints, I am illumined and enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਭਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲਾ ਅਪਣਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਆਪਿ ਜਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: deen deaal bhe kirapaalaa apanaa naam aap japaaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: God, Merciful to the meek, has become kind and compassionate; He has inspired me to chant His Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਸੂਖ ਮਨਿ ਵੂਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: sarab kaliaan sookh man vootthe |
lines.english: I am blessed with total salvation, and my mind is filled with peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਤ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਈ ਆਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har har japat pooran bhee aas |1|
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, my hopes have been fulfilled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੂਠੇ ॥੨॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: har gun gaae gur naanak tootthe |2|12|
lines.english: I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord; O Nanak, the Guru has been gracious to me. ||2||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਬਿਭਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 5 ghar 2 bibhaas |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Bibhaas:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: avar na doojaa tthaau |
lines.english: There is no other place of rest,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸਿਧਿ ਕਲਿਆਨ ॥
lines.translit: sarab sidh kaliaan |
lines.english: There is total success and salvation,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਹਿ ਸਗਲ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pooran hohi sagal kaam |1|
lines.english: and all affairs are perfectly resolved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਹੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naahee bin har naau |
lines.english: none at all, without the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਦੂਖੁ ਭਾਗੈ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਾਲਨ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: naam laagai dookh bhaagai saran paalan jog |
lines.english: Attached to the Naam, the Name of the Lord, pain runs away. In His Sanctuary, He cherishes and sustains us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੀਐ ਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: har ko naam japeeai neet |
lines.english: Constantly chant the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਲਗੈ ਏਕੈ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh ahankaar binasai lagai ekai preet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Sexuality, anger and egotism are wiped away; let yourself fall in love with the One Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਨਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਤਜਹੁ ਮਨ ਕੇ ਭਰਮ ॥
lines.translit: rain dinas dhiaae har har tajahu man ke bharam |
lines.english: Night and day, meditate on the Lord, Har, Har; abandon the doubts of your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਜਮੁ ਨ ਤੇਟੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਧੁਰਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur bhettai jam na tettai jis dhur hovai sanjog |2|
lines.english: Whoever has such pre-ordained destiny meets with the True Guru; the Messenger of Death cannot grab him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਬਿਖਾਦ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam bikhaad binase raakh leene aap |
lines.english: The sins of countless lifetimes are erased, and one is protected by the Lord Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਿਸਹਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਰਮ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat har milai jiseh pooran karam |3|
lines.english: One who has perfect karma joins the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and meets the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਮੀਤ ਭਾਈ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪਿ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa meet bhaaee jan naanak har har jaap |4|1|13|
lines.english: He is our Mother, Father, Friend and Sibling; O servant Nanak, meditate on the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||1||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਬਿਭਾਸ ਪੜਤਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 5 bibhaas parrataal |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl, Bibhaas, Partaal:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਸੰਤ ਚਰਨ ਲਾਗਿ ਮਨੁ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਜਾਹਿ ਪਾਪ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aap tiaag sant charan laag man pavit jaeh paap |1|
lines.english: Renounce your selfishness, and grasp the feet of the Saints; your mind shall be sanctified, and your sins shall be taken away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਲੋਭ ਮੋਹ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਇ ਅਹੰ ਤਾਪ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kal kales lobh moh binas jaae ahan taap |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Conflict, suffering, greed and emotional attachment shall be dispelled, and the fever of egotism shall be relieved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਜਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: ram raam raam raam jaap |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam, Raam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਬਾਰਿਕੁ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਰਾਖਨ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਾਈ ਬਾਪ ॥੨॥੧॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak baarik kachhoo na jaanai raakhan kau prabh maaee baap |2|1|14|
lines.english: Nanak, the child, does not know anything at all. O God, please protect me; You are my Mother and Father. ||2||1||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸਰਨਿ ਟੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal saran ttek |
lines.english: I have taken the Shelter and Support of the Lord's Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚ ਮੂਚ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸਰਬ ਊਪਰਿ ਤੁਹੀ ਏਕ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aooch mooch beant tthaakur sarab aoopar tuhee ek |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are Lofty and Exalted, Grand and Infinite, O my Lord and Master; You alone are above all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਅਧਾਰ ਦੁਖ ਬਿਦਾਰ ਦੈਨਹਾਰ ਬੁਧਿ ਬਿਬੇਕ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: praan adhaar dukh bidaar dainahaar budh bibek |1|
lines.english: He is the Support of the breath of life, the Destroyer of pain, the Giver of discriminating understanding. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਮਸਕਾਰ ਰਖਨਹਾਰ ਮਨਿ ਅਰਾਧਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਮੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: namasakaar rakhanahaar man araadh prabhoo mek |
lines.english: So bow down in respect to the Savior Lord; worship and adore the One God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਰੇਨੁ ਕਰਉ ਮਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਵੈ ਸੁਖ ਅਨੇਕ ॥੨॥੨॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: sant ren krau majan naanak paavai sukh anek |2|2|15|
lines.english: Bathing in the dust of the feet of the Saints, Nanak is blessed with countless comforts. ||2||2||15||
